name: Oneohtrix Point Never
bio: Oneohtrix Point Never is Daniel Lopatin's experimental electronic project, spanning ambient collage, synthetic pop, and film-score-adjacent catalog work.
notable_for: Experimental electronic production, soundtrack crossover, and deep critical-canon recognition.
career_highlight: Work across solo records, film scoring, and high-profile collaborations widened the catalog's long-tail value.
revenue_drivers: Streaming from a loyal specialist audience supports the core catalog.
Film and media associations improve sync-style visibility.
Critical-canon status helps older records keep being rediscovered.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps Oneohtrix Point Never's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: Oneohtrix Point Never's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
